description:
Advances: mutagen.json_schema, mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
- `lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex` (module `MutagenEx.JsonReporter`).
  Owns both success and abort JSON variants per
  [mutagen.decision.json_reporter_owns_error](.spec/decisions/json_reporter_owns_error.md).
  Exposes `emit_report/1` and `emit_error/2` returning `{iodata, exit_code}`.
  No `IO.puts` / `System.halt` / `File.write!` calls inside.
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` orchestration: state machine that dispatches
  through the private collaborator table set up in S1. Drives the pipeline
  CLI → ScopeResolver → TestSelector → AstCache → CoverageRunner →
  MutationEnumerator → Baseline → MutationRunner → JsonReporter → I/O.
- Stable v1 JSON schema covering all top-level fields per
  [mutagen.json_schema](.spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md) r1-r8.
- Golden fixtures at `test/mutagen_ex/golden/`:
  `baseline_red.json`, `coverage_partial_mutation_perfect.json`,
  `coverage_full_mutation_partial.json`, `error_unresolvable_scope.json`,
  `mutation_with_skipped.json`, `partial_report_cover_failure.json`.
- Test files: `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`,
  `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs`. State-machine error-path
  tests inject fake collaborators via the private dispatch table to cover
  all six error-exit paths.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`,
  `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs`.
- Covers spec-verification stubs `mutagen.json_schema.v1`-`.v4`,
  `mutagen.cli.v2` (exit codes).
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios `mutagen.json_schema.s1` through `s6`,
  scenarios `mutagen.cli.s6` and `s7`.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex` (S5)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex` (S5)
- `test/fixtures/lane_project/**` (S7)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**` (S4a)

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex`
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (orchestration body; skeleton already exists
  from S1)
- `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/golden/*.json`
- `@moduledoc` skeleton on `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen` (full doc content lands in
  S8)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not write a separate `ErrorReporter`. Both JSON variants live in one
  module per [mutagen.decision.json_reporter_owns_error](.spec/decisions/json_reporter_owns_error.md).
- Do not include any I/O inside the reporter. The Mix task body does
  `IO.puts` / `File.write!` based on `Config.json_path`.
- Do not support `--no-json` here. It exits with `:flag_not_supported_in_v1`
  per [mutagen.decision.no_pretty_output_v1](.spec/decisions/no_pretty_output_v1.md).

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] All golden fixtures match byte-for-byte
- [ ] State-machine error-path tests cover all 6 exits
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.json_schema.v1`-`.v4`, `mutagen.cli.v2`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: fa1552c1-29af-4847-9fbc-5065c95d3be9
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/fa1552c1-29af-4847-9fbc-5065c95d3be9.jsonl

Commit: b2dd4d1

Files touched:
- lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex (new)
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (orchestration body — full state machine
  added; @moduledoc was already populated from S1)
- test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs (new — 34 tests)
- test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs (new — 6 byte-equal
  fixture tests)
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/*.json (6 new fixtures)
- .spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md (verification stubs flipped to
  execute: true — authorized by orchestrator scope note)

Tests added:
- MutagenEx.JsonReporterTest: 34 tests across describe blocks for
  emit_report success (s1, r1, r2), mutation block shape (s2, r3, r4),
  emit_error abort variant (s3, r5), I/O contract (s4, r6), encoding
  round-trip + trailing newline (s5, r7, r8), and Mix task state-machine
  error paths (the six abort exits the ticket enumerates + happy path).
- MutagenEx.JsonReporterGoldenTest: 6 byte-equal fixture tests covering
  the required fixture set in r9: baseline_red, coverage_partial_mutation_
  perfect, coverage_full_mutation_partial, error_unresolvable_scope,
  mutation_with_skipped, partial_report_cover_failure.

Verification stubs flipped to execute: true:
- mutagen.json_schema.v1 (r1-r4)
- mutagen.json_schema.v2 (r5, --only error_variants)
- mutagen.json_schema.v3 (r9, golden tests)
- mutagen.json_schema.v4 (r6-r8, --only contract)

mutagen.cli.v2 (--only exit_codes) was already execute: true; the new
state-machine error-path tests carry that tag and pass.

Audit-expanded scope: n/a (iteration 1).

Deferred must requirements: none.

Summary: Stood up MutagenEx.JsonReporter as the single owner of the v1
JSON schema (both success and abort variants per mutagen.decision.
json_reporter_owns_error). Wired the S1 mix-task dispatch table into
the full pipeline CLI → Scope → Tests → AstCache → Coverage →
Enumerator → Baseline → MutationRunner → JsonReporter → IO. The
reporter is pure: emit_report/1 and emit_error/2 return
{iodata, exit_code} and never call IO/System.halt/File.write; the
mix task owns the I/O via the :io dispatch key, which tests override
to capture the document without halting the VM. S1's two-key legacy
dispatch (:reporter, :pipeline) is preserved on a fallback code path
so existing CLI tests keep passing unchanged.

Project verification: mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean;
mix test = 1 doctest, 305 tests, 0 failures.

VERIFY: PASS

Session: fa1552c1-29af-4847-9fbc-5065c95d3be9
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/fa1552c1-29af-4847-9fbc-5065c95d3be9.jsonl

## Scope check (mechanical)

Diff against `e00af54` (merge-base epic/mutagen-wrd HEAD) touches 11 files:

- lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex (NEW) — Allowed
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (orchestration body) — Allowed (skeleton from S1)
- test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs (NEW) — Allowed
- test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs (NEW) — Allowed
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/{baseline_red,coverage_full_mutation_partial,coverage_partial_mutation_perfect,error_unresolvable_scope,mutation_with_skipped,partial_report_cover_failure}.json (6 NEW) — Allowed
- .spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md — NOT in ticket's Allowed-touches list, but flips 4 verification stubs `execute: false → true` only (no requirement/scenario changes). Pre-authorized by orchestrator scope-expansion note. PASS.

mix.exs, mix.lock unchanged. No `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**`, no `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex`, no `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex`, no `test/fixtures/lane_project/**` touched.

## Spec-verification stubs (all 4 + cli.v2 executed locally)

- `mutagen.json_schema.v1` (`mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`) → 34 tests, 0 failures
- `mutagen.json_schema.v2` (`--only error_variants`) → 7 tests, 0 failures
- `mutagen.json_schema.v3` (golden test file) → 6 tests, 0 failures
- `mutagen.json_schema.v4` (`--only contract`) → 7 tests, 0 failures
- `mutagen.cli.v2` (`mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs --only exit_codes`) → 5 tests, 0 failures (S1 CLI suite, byte-identical to base)
- Full suite (`mix test`) → 1 doctest, 305 tests, 0 failures
- `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` → exit 0

## Must-requirement trace

**mutagen.json_schema (r1–r9):**

- r1 `version: "1"` — test json_reporter_test.exs:81; would fail if encoder emitted anything other than literal "1".
- r2 success doc all non-null except abort_reason — test json_reporter_test.exs:99 (loops every top-level key); would fail if any required field was null on success.
- r3 mutation block 11 subfields — test json_reporter_test.exs:194 (loops 11 keys); would fail if any subfield missing.
- r4 result entry fields — test json_reporter_test.exs:213; would fail if id/file/line/column/mutator/before/before_source/after/status/tainted_predecessors/warnings missing.
- r5 abort doc same schema, sub-blocks null when phases never ran — tests json_reporter_test.exs:274, 292, 313, 336. The "every documented abort_reason atom round-trips" test (line 313) covers all 11 r5 atoms.
- r6 `{iodata, exit_code}`, no I/O in reporter — tests json_reporter_test.exs:382, 388, 396 (last is an AST walk forbidding IO.puts/IO.write/System.halt/File.write); confirmed by grep — only docstring mentions exist.
- r7 valid JSON, UTF-8 — tests json_reporter_test.exs:442, 450 (round-trip + UTF-8 source slice).
- r8 exactly one trailing newline — tests json_reporter_test.exs:494, 503. Verified mechanically: all 6 golden files end with byte 0x0a; encoder emits `[iodata, ?\n]` (json_reporter.ex:182).
- r9 6 golden fixtures byte-equal — 6 named test functions in json_reporter_golden_test.exs, each calling `assert_golden` with byte-exact comparison.

**mutagen.cli (r6, r7 — the two covered by this ticket):**

- r6 exit 0 success / non-zero abort — tests json_reporter_test.exs:689 (happy path, code=0) and 533/547/568/587/609/632/665 (7 abort paths, all assert `code != 0`).
- r7 `--no-json` rejected with `:flag_not_supported_in_v1` — unchanged S1 test in cli_test.exs:369 still passes via legacy dispatch.

## Specific verifier checks from orchestrator

1. **6 state-machine abort paths enumerated in the ticket**: Implementation provides 7 distinct abort tests, tagged `:exit_codes` (NOT `:error_variants`). The orchestrator's framing inverted the tag mapping; the actual spec uses `:error_variants` for reporter abort-variant content (json_schema.v2) and `:exit_codes` for state-machine exit-code discipline (cli.v2). Path coverage: CLI parse → `missing_scope`, Scope resolve → `module_not_found`, Test selector → `no_tests_match`, AstCache → `parse_error`, Coverage → `cover_already_running`, Baseline → `baseline_red`, MutationRunner → `unrecoverable_restore_failure`. Ticket enumerated 6 (combining baseline+mutation as path 6); impl tests them separately → 7 paths. PASS (exceeds requirement).

2. **6 golden fixtures byte-equal exercising the full error catalog**: All 6 present, all end with `\n`, all pass byte-equal compare. Reasons exercised: `baseline_red`, `module_not_found`, `cover_already_running` (abort variants) + success with mixed killed/survived/timeout (`coverage_full_mutation_partial`) + success with skipped/compile_error (`mutation_with_skipped`) + 100% kill rate partial coverage (`coverage_partial_mutation_perfect`). Full r5 error-catalog vocabulary is exercised in the `:error_variants` round-trip test (json_reporter_test.exs:313). PASS.

3. **Trailing-newline contract**: `:json.encode/2` result wrapped as `[iodata, ?\n]` in json_reporter.ex:182. Verified mechanically: every golden fixture's last byte is 0x0a (no double-newline). Tests at json_reporter_test.exs:494 and 503 assert `String.ends_with?(str, "\n")` AND `refute String.ends_with?(str, "\n\n")` for both success and abort docs. PASS.

4. **`nil` → JSON `null`**: Encoder hook in json_reporter.ex:355 explicitly maps `nil` to the charlist `~c"null"`. Test at json_reporter_test.exs:292 asserts `decoded["baseline"] == :null`, `decoded["coverage"] == :null`, `decoded["mutation"] == :null` from a report where those struct fields were `nil` (the default). Additional test at line 92 asserts `decoded["abort_reason"] == :null` on success (struct default is `nil`). `:null` is what `:json.decode/1` returns for JSON null in OTP 27. PASS.

5. **S1 two-key legacy dispatch (`:reporter`, `:pipeline`) preserved on fallback path**: lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:172–179 routes through `run_legacy/2` when the caller passes `:pipeline` but no `:coverage` (the new phase key). test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs is byte-identical to the base ref (no diff against e00af54). All 37 S1 CLI tests pass unchanged. PASS.

## Source-claim trace: `:json` (OTP 27+) only — no third-party JSON deps

- `mix.exs` deps list is empty (only commented examples) — unchanged.
- `mix.lock` does not exist (no diff). Confirmed via `git diff --stat mix.exs mix.lock` (empty).
- Repo-wide grep for `Jason|Poison|jason|poison` in lib/ and test/ → only a single occurrence in test/mutagen_ex/integration/c1_test.exs comment ("don't poison"), unrelated to JSON encoding.
- `:json` references in lib/: json_reporter.ex:181 (`:json.encode(doc, &encoder/2)`), 356 (`:json.encode_value(value, enc)`); test surface uses `:json.decode/1`. All Erlang stdlib `:json` (OTP 27+).
- No `Code.ensure_loaded?(:json)` shim — relies on Elixir 1.19 / OTP 27+ availability declared in mix.exs (`elixir: "~> 1.19"`).
- PASS.

## Scope-expansion recognition

The implementer touched `.spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md` to flip 4 verification stubs (`execute: false → true`). This is NOT listed in the ticket's Allowed-touches but IS explicitly pre-authorized by the orchestrator's scope-expansion note. Diff is mechanical (4 single-character changes, no requirement/scenario edits). PASS as scope-expansion, properly disclosed in the implementer's comment.

## Merge-gate checklist (verifier view)

- [x] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [x] All 6 golden fixtures match byte-for-byte
- [x] State-machine error-path tests cover all 6+ abort exits (impl has 7)
- [x] Spec verification passes (`json_schema.v1-.v4`, `cli.v2`)
- [x] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (+ pre-authorized spec stub flips)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket (left to auditor)

VERDICT: VERIFY PASS. Ready for auditor review.

AUDIT: APPROVE

Session: respawn after prior auditor exited with API connection error
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex-mutagen-wrd-8/audit-respawn.jsonl

## Independent re-run (base e00af54, head b2dd4d1)

- `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` → exit 0
- `mix test` → 1 doctest, 305 tests, 0 failures
- `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs --only error_variants` → 7/7 PASS
- `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs --only contract` → 7/7 PASS
- `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs --only exit_codes` → 8/8 PASS (7 abort + 1 happy)
- `mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs --only exit_codes` → 5/5 PASS

## Scope (mechanical)

`git diff --name-only e00af54 HEAD` → 11 files:
- lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex (NEW) — Allowed
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex — Allowed (skeleton from S1)
- test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs (NEW) — Allowed
- test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs (NEW) — Allowed
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/{baseline_red, coverage_full_mutation_partial, coverage_partial_mutation_perfect, error_unresolvable_scope, mutation_with_skipped, partial_report_cover_failure}.json (6 NEW) — Allowed (r9 list matches exactly)
- .spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md — NOT in ticket Allowed-touches, BUT diff is 4 single-character flips (execute: false → true on v1/v2/v3/v4); no requirement/scenario edits. Pre-authorized by orchestrator note (precedent .1/.3/.4/.5/.6/.7). PASS as scope-expansion.

No lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**, no mutation_runner.ex, no coverage_runner.ex, no test/fixtures/lane_project/** touched. mix.exs/mix.lock unchanged (mix.lock does not exist; deps list empty).

## Orchestrator-specified verifier checks

1. **State-machine abort paths (6 or 7) map 1:1 to error catalog with distinct exit codes**: 7 abort-path tests at json_reporter_test.exs:533/547/568/587/609/632/665 cover (in order) missing_scope, module_not_found, no_tests_match, parse_error, cover_already_running, baseline_red, unrecoverable_restore_failure. Each is a distinct phase exit. All assert code != 0 (or implicit via {:aborted, ...} return). Ticket enumerated 6; impl tests 7 (split baseline-red from mutation-restore-failure). PASS (exceeds requirement).

2. **Trailing-newline contract (binary inspect)**: All 6 golden fixtures end with byte 0x0a, verified mechanically (`tail -c 1 | xxd`):
   - baseline_red.json (444 B), coverage_full_mutation_partial.json (1740 B), coverage_partial_mutation_perfect.json (1202 B), error_unresolvable_scope.json (244 B), mutation_with_skipped.json (1753 B), partial_report_cover_failure.json (370 B) — all last byte = 0x0a, no fixture has 0x0a 0x0a.
   - Source: json_reporter.ex:182 wraps as `[iodata, ?\n]`.
   - Contract tests at json_reporter_test.exs:494, 503 assert `String.ends_with?(str, "\n")` AND `refute String.ends_with?(str, "\n\n")` for BOTH success and abort. PASS.

3. **nil → JSON null test on a deliberately-nil field**: Encoder hook at json_reporter.ex:355 (`defp encoder(nil, _enc), do: ~c"null"`). Test at json_reporter_test.exs:292 ("baseline, coverage, mutation are null when those phases never ran") builds `%Report{meta: meta_minimum()}` — `baseline`, `coverage`, `mutation` default to `nil` on the struct (json_reporter.ex:33-41). After encoding + decoding, asserts `decoded["baseline"] == :null`, `decoded["coverage"] == :null`, `decoded["mutation"] == :null` (Erlang's :json.decode/1 returns the atom :null for JSON null). Also confirmed by error_unresolvable_scope.json fixture: literally contains `"baseline":null,"coverage":null,...,"mutation":null,...,"tests":null`. PASS.

4. **:json (OTP 27+) only, no Jason/Poison**: mix.exs deps list empty (lines 22-27, only commented examples). No mix.lock. Repo grep for Jason/Poison/jason/poison in lib/+test/: only one false-positive comment ("don't poison" in c1_test.exs:176, unrelated). lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex uses `:json.encode/2` (line 181) and `:json.encode_value/2` (line 356); tests use `:json.decode/1`. Elixir ~> 1.19 / OTP 27+ assumed in mix.exs. PASS.

5. **S1 two-key legacy dispatch preserved; new pipeline uses 11-key dispatch**: mutagen.ex:172-178 routes via `run_legacy/2` when caller passes `:pipeline` without `:coverage` (the new phase key). `default_dispatch/0` (lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:587-604) exposes 11 keys (cli, scope, tests, ast_cache, coverage, enumerator, baseline, mutation, reporter_ok, reporter_error, io) PLUS the two legacy back-compat keys (reporter, pipeline). test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs is byte-identical to base (diff against e00af54 is empty); all 37 S1 CLI tests pass unchanged. PASS.

6. **Golden fixtures byte-equal; REGEN=1 workflow**: 6 fixtures present matching r9 list exactly. Golden test helper at json_reporter_golden_test.exs:42-78 (`assert_golden`) does byte-exact compare via `IO.iodata_to_binary` vs `File.read!`. On `REGEN=1` (line 40, 46) it rewrites the file; without REGEN it flunks with a usable `.actual` diff path. PASS.

## Must-requirement trace

- r1 (version "1") — json_reporter_test.exs:81; r2 (success all non-null except abort_reason) — :99 loops every key; r3 (mutation 11 subfields) — :194 loops 11 keys; r4 (result entry fields) — :213 loops 11 keys; r5 (abort same schema, sub-blocks null) — :274, :292, :313, :336; r6 ({iodata, exit_code} + no I/O) — :382, :388, :396 (AST walk forbidding IO.puts/IO.write/System.halt/File.write/File.write!); r7 (valid JSON, UTF-8) — :442, :450; r8 (exactly one trailing newline) — :494, :503; r9 (6 golden fixtures byte-equal) — 6 named tests in json_reporter_golden_test.exs.
- cli.r6 (exit 0 success / non-zero abort) — :689 + 7 abort tests; cli.r7 (--no-json rejected) — unchanged S1 cli_test.exs PASS via legacy dispatch.

## Out of Scope (intent) check

- No separate ErrorReporter module — confirmed; both variants live in MutagenEx.JsonReporter (decision.json_reporter_owns_error honoured).
- No I/O inside reporter — confirmed mechanically by the AST walk test (:396) and grep: the only IO/File/System mentions in json_reporter.ex are in @moduledoc strings.
- No --no-json support added here — unchanged S1 path handles it.

## Merge-gate

- [x] Code compiles cleanly with --warnings-as-errors
- [x] All golden fixtures match byte-for-byte (REGEN=1 workflow present)
- [x] State-machine error-path tests cover all 6+ abort exits (7 implemented)
- [x] Spec verification passes (v1-v4, cli.v2)
- [x] Scope check (Allowed + pre-authorized spec stub flips)
- [x] Auditor APPROVE

VERDICT: APPROVE. Ready to merge into epic/mutagen-wrd.

APPROVED. Merged into epic/mutagen-wrd. Closing per orchestrator sign-off. Clean ff-merge. Post-merge gates: mix compile --warnings-as-errors ✓, mix test 305+1 doctest 0 failures ✓, mix format ✓. Auditor agent crashed first time with API connection error; respawned cleanly and approved.

title: S6: JSON reporter + Mix task wiring
